---
title: 'Corrigendum to "Occupant exposure to indoor air pollutants in modern European offices: An integrated modelling approach
  [Atmos. Environ. 82 (2014) 9-16]"'
date: '2014-01-01'
author:
- A.C. Terry
- N. Carslaw
- M. Ashmore
- S. Dimitroulopoulou
- D.C. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Corrigendum to "Occupant exposure to indoor air pollutants in modern European offices: An integrated modelling approach [Atmos. Environ. 82 (2014) 9-16]"

<p class="pub-meta">A.C. Terry, N. Carslaw, M. Ashmore, S. Dimitroulopoulou, D.C. Carslaw</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2014


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2014-a.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
